reviews.comment:
Fuimos a las 7 am, el lugar limpio, calentito...el café espectacular, no estaba hervido, pedí leche de almendras y tenían...pero por sobre todo la atención fué genial,les doy un 10,ojalá qué sigan así,saludos.

(Translated by Google)
We went at 7 am, the place was clean and warm...the coffee was spectacular, not boiled, I asked for almond milk and they had it...but above all the service was great, I give them a 10, I hope they keep it up, greetings.

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) This gas station chain served us well during a trip throughout Argentina. The service and facilities were very good, meeting all our needs; the restrooms had showers, and there was security in the parking area. We are very grateful for everything and look forward to our return.

(Original)
Essa rede de postos nos atendeu em uma viagem por toda Argentina. Atendimento e instalações muito boa, supriu nossa necessidade, banheiros com chuveiro, segurança no pátio. Só agradecer por tudo e até a volta.
